content.full_text:
November 21, 2001

Renee Pierce
Deputy City Clerk
City of Calimesa
Post Office Box 1190
908 Park Avenue
Calimesa, CA 92320

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-253

Dear Ms. Pierce:

As discussed in our phone conversation of November 20, 2001, this letter is to memorialize the withdrawal of your October 19, 2001, request for written advice to the Fair Political Practices Commission

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-252
